prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mitsubishi-sourced 4G63T (2.0L turbocharged inline-4, 280+ hp with forged internals) paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Tomei 80mm titanium tip, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco OS Giken 2.2L limited-slip differential, South Bend Stage 3 clutch kit, and a custom 6-speed manual transmission swap (from a Mitsubishi Evolution X) with a Quaife sequential gearset

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the S6 Sport chassis), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for improved handling response
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (modified to fit the S6 Sport’s unique wheelbase) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to accommodate 19x10.5 ET20 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35 front, 295/30 rear)

Custom carbon fiber hood with a functional venting system (designed in collaboration with Seibon Carbon) to improve engine bay airflow, paired with a custom front bumper lip from Varis for aggressive aerodynamics

Full interior overhaul featuring Recaro SPG-XL seats (retrimmed in Alcantara with BYD S6 Sport embroidery), a custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK (bolt-in, TIG-welded), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub
